title: Azifa with Rich Caramelized Fig Jam
description: A sweet and tangy Ethiopian dessert featuring caramelized fig jam, crunchy almonds, and a touch of lemon.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, melt the unsalted butter over medium heat.
Add the caramelized fig jam and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to medium-low and let cook for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the jam has thickened slightly.
Stir in the sliced almonds, granulated sugar, lemon juice, and kosher salt.
Continue to cook for another 2-3 minutes, until the mixture is fragrant and the almonds are toasted.
Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and let cool slightly.
Serve warm or at room temperature, topped with a dollop of plain yogurt if desired.
Note: To caramelize the fig jam, heat 2 tablespoons of sugar and 2 tablespoons of water in a saucepan over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until the sugar has dissolved.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to medium-low and let cook for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the mixture has thickened and turned a deep amber color.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly before using.
